ENGN4339.name: Programs and Courses

prerequisites.raw: To enrol in this course you must have completedENGN2218Electronics Systems and Design andENGN3338Aerodynamics

ENGN4339.description: This course provides students with experience in developing microcontroller-based instrumentation for aerospace applications, with particular emphasis on measurement of fluid quantities, including tem...
ENGN4339.assumedKnowledge: Basic programming and breadboard-based construction are assumed.  Students should be able to convert between binary, decimal and hexadecimal numbers.
